definition:
μεταξύ
 (μετά + ξύν = σύν), [in LXX: Gen.31:50, Jdg.5:27, III Ki  15:6; 3Ki.15:32, Wis.4:10 16:19 18:23 * ;] 
  1. adv. of place and time (in NT time only); 
   (a) between: ἐν τῷ μ. (s.with χρόνῳ), Jhn.4:31; 
   (b) in late writers (FlJ, Plut., al.), like μετά (adv.), after, afterwards: τὸ μ. σάββατον, Act.13:42 (cf. Cl., Ro., I Co., 44, 2). 
   2. Prep. with genitive, between: of place, Mat.23:35, Luk.11:51 16:26, Act.12:6; of persons, as to mutual relation, Mat.18:15, Act.15:9, Rom.2:1-29 15:1-33.†
 (AS)
